description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU CUDA Test that tests and optionally publishes CUDA wheels for FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU. The workflow takes several inputs, including a matrix configuration, container settings, repository reference, extra environment variables, PyTorch channel and version, and a flag to publish to PyPI. It uses a matrix strategy to run jobs on different host machines and CUDA versions, and performs various steps such as setting up the build container, checking out the repository, downloading the wheel artifact, installing dependencies, testing with PyTest, and pushing the wheel to PyPI.
